message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 5
Recent Green phase: Replaced hardcoded shortcut with real Conway logic — builds a neighbor-count map by iterating each live cell's 8 neighbors, then keeps cells satisfying survival (live with 2-3 neighbors) or reproduction (dead with exactly 3 neighbors). Uses string keys ("x,y") for Map/Set.

Refactor the implementation while keeping all tests green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return when done.

content.text: I'll analyze the current implementation and look for refactoring opportunities.
